title: Download your free industry report ahead of The Game Business Live
author: Christopher Dring
excerpt: Data specialist Ampere talks GTA 6 impact, Battlefield 6 vs Arc Raiders, Hollywood, Roblox, Fortnite and the FIFA World Cup in this free report
text:
The Game Business Live returns on Monday, June 8 in Los Angeles, and we have a special pre-event treat for our readers.
Data specialist Ampere has put together an exclusive report that dives into relevant topics, data and insight that will relate to some of the topics at this year’s event. The 35-page report is titled Winning Attention & Defining Cultural Moments:
Key forces shaping console/PC games in 2026, and it covers:
The expected impact of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in the US
Who might feel the most impact during the launch of GTA 6
What we can learn from Battlefield 6 vs Arc Raiders
The rise of Roblox and the decline of Fortnite
TV, Movies and Fortnite’s Overwatch collaboration
You can download the free report through here.
The Game Business Live will touch upon some of these topics, and features interviews with Xbox Chief Strategy Officer Matthew Ball , EA Entertainment President Laura Miele and video game legend Jason Rubin .
The event is now sold out. It is sponsored by Kuro Games and FortySeven Communications.
Here is the full schedule:
08:30 – 09:30: Registration/Coffee/Muffins
09:35 – 09:45: Introducion – Geoff Keighley and Christopher Dring
09:45 – 10:20: The Game Business Show w/ Matthew Ball
10:20 – 10:55: Interview: Laura Miele (EA Entertainment)
10:55 – 11:05: Break
11:05 – 11:55: Legend Interview: Jason Rubin
12:00 – 13:00: Networking Tea/Coffee
There are more details on the event here, and the sessions will be released as episodes of The Game Business Show in the future.
For more data and insight, subscribe to The Game Business for free
